name: cbb-sabermetrics
description: Live college baseball sabermetrics for 330 NCAA DI programs via the Blaze Sports Intel MCP. Advanced metrics (wOBA, wRC+, FIP, BABIP, ISO), conference power index, scoreboard, standings, rankings, team and player lookups, matchup detail.

interface.shortDescription: Live NCAA DI college baseball sabermetrics via Blaze Sports Intel MCP
interface.longDescription: Use College Baseball Sabermetrics to query live DI scores, conference standings, Top 25 rankings, team and player advanced metrics (wOBA, wRC+, FIP, BABIP, ISO), national and conference leaderboards, SOS-adjusted conference power index, full team schedules, and deep matchup detail with venue, weather, and predictions. All data sourced from the Blaze Sports Intel MCP server at blazesportsintel.com/mcp — free tier, 30 requests/minute, no API key required. Primary source: Highlightly live feeds. Fallback: ESPN. Advanced metrics: BSI Savant daily recompute.
interface.defaultPrompt: Pull the current SEC standings and the top 10 hitters by wRC+ in the SEC.
